title: JD 1: MERN Stack Developer (Technical)
responsibilities: o 2+ years experience with MERN stack
o Experience with Git, Agile methodologies
o Bachelor's in Computer Science or equivalent
- Nice to have: AWS knowledge, GraphQL experience
raw_text:
JD 1: MERN Stack Developer (Technical)                                  
            •  Title: MERN Stack Developer                                        
                                                                                  
            •  Summary: Build and maintain web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js.
                                                                                  
            •  Responsibilities: Develop frontend components, design REST APIs, optimize performance.
                                                                                  
            •  Requirements:                                                      
                 o  2+ years experience with MERN stack                           
                                                                                  
                 o  Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, Redux                   
                                                                                  
                 o  Experience with Git, Agile methodologies                      
                                                                                  
                 o  Bachelor's in Computer Science or equivalent                  
            •  Nice to have: AWS knowledge, GraphQL experience                    
                                                                                  
            •  Location: Remote                                                   
                                                                                  
            •  Salary Range: $70k–$90k
cleaned_text:
JD 1: MERN Stack Developer (Technical) 
 - Title: MERN Stack Developer 
 
 - Summary: Build and maintain web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js.
 
 - Responsibilities: Develop frontend components, design REST APIs, optimize performance.
 
 - Requirements: 
 o 2+ years experience with MERN stack 
 
 o Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, Redux 
 
 o Experience with Git, Agile methodologies 
 
 o Bachelor's in Computer Science or equivalent 
 - Nice to have: AWS knowledge, GraphQL experience 
 
 - Location: Remote 
 
 - Salary Range: $70k–$90k
